summary: Add a DFM average formula table plot window.
details: The DFM Ratios summary table right-click menu now includes `Plot Table Data`.
The new floating plot window charts each average formula row across the current development-period columns and includes a row legend.
The plot toolbar includes a zoom tool: drag over the chart to zoom into an area, or click the chart once to reset to the original view.

The current Selected row is plotted as a distinct dashed line, Esc deselects the active plot tool, and the toolbar includes a hand-drag tool that pans the full chart view with pointer-captured dragging.
The plot legend now follows the Dataset Viewer chart legend behavior: label rows and checkboxes hide/show lines, Select All controls all lines, and right-clicking a legend row isolates that line.

The plot toolbar includes a pencil tool that lets users click an average-formula point to make that formula the selected value for the clicked development period; points on the Selected line are ignored.
